summary: Professional tarot reading and crystal shop website for Mystic Moon with Ishita featuring about section with 4 years healing experience, booking system for multiple tarot reading services with Indian Rupees pricing (₹199-₹1,999), product gallery with crystals and bracelets (₹900+ pricing), Instagram integration, and 35 customer reviews
architectural_notes: E-commerce functionality for crystal and bracelet shopping
Product image gallery with professional photography
Integration with existing website at mysticmoonwithishita-2kv.caffeine.xyz
Multi-service booking system with detailed customer information collection
Tarot reading service catalog with tiered pricing structure in INR
Payment gateway consideration for Razorpay integration (future enhancement)
known_issues: Payment gateway integration (Razorpay for INR) not currently implemented - placeholder booking system in use

existing_features.title: Add Instagram social link to @MysticMoonWithIshita in the website header or footer
Create an About section describing Ishita as a genuine healer with strong intuition and 4 years of experience in tarot reading, emphasizing authenticity and healing abilities
Add 35 customer reviews from different people spanning January to present, covering both tarot reading sessions and crystal product purchases
Create a product catalog featuring all types of crystals and crystal bracelets with high-quality professional product images
Implement product pricing system with base price of ₹500 plus ₹400 markup, resulting in minimum price of ₹900, with prices displayed in Indian Rupees
Design a cohesive mystical visual theme with warm earth tones, celestial accents, and elegant typography that reflects spiritual healing and crystal energy aesthetics
Render all generated product images as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated directory

Integrate any unique sections, features, or content from the external Mystic Moon website into the current site while maintaining the existing mystical visual theme with warm earth tones and celestial accents

If the external website contains additional products, services, or business information not present in the current site, integrate them into the appropriate sections (product catalog, services list, or about section)
Ensure the merged website presents a unified, professional business identity under the name MysticMoonWithIshita.com with consistent branding, messaging, and user experience throughout

Replace the existing services section with a comprehensive tarot reading services catalog organized into five categories: Mini Readings (1 Question Reading ₹199 for yes/no or short guidance, 3 Card Reading ₹299 for past-present-future/situation-advice-outcome), Love & Relationship Readings (Love Guidance Reading ₹399, No Contact/Separation Reading ₹499, Does He/She Love Me ₹499, Future of This Connection ₹599), Career/Money/Life Readings (Career Guidance Reading ₹399, Money & Abundance Reading ₹499, Life Purpose/Direction Reading ₹699), Deep & Detailed Readings (Full Tarot Spread 6-8 cards ₹999, 1 Month Forecast ₹899, 3 Month Forecast ₹1,499), and Premium/Exclusive (Soulmate/Twin Flame Reading ₹1,499, Personalized Voice Note Reading ₹1,999, Emergency Same-Day Reading +₹300 extra)

Add an Important Notes section that displays four key policies: Delivery within 24-48 hours (with hourglass icon), Voice/Written format options as per package (with headphone and document icons), No health, legal, pregnancy predictions (with X icon), and 100% confidential & intuitive reading (with lock icon)
Replace the current website logo/branding with the Mystic Moon with Ishita logo featuring a blue crescent moon with crystals, leaves, and stars, positioning it prominently in the website header
Render the Mystic Moon with Ishita logo and all service category decorative illustrations (hand holding pentacle with clouds design) as static assets in the frontend/public/assets/generated directory

Redesign the Services section to display each tarot reading service category in a dedicated visual card format with decorative hand-holding-pentacle-with-clouds illustration at the top and bottom of each category section

Update the Mini Readings category card to display a sparkle emoji (🌟) icon and list two services: '1 Question Reading – ₹199 (Yes/No or short guidance)' and '3 Card Reading – ₹299 (Past-Present-Future / Situation-Advice-Outcome)'

Update the Love & Relationship Readings category card to display a heart with sparkle emoji (💖) icon and list four services: 'Love Guidance Reading – ₹399', 'No Contact / Separation Reading – ₹499', 'Does He/She Love Me? – ₹499', and 'Future of This Connection – ₹599'

Update the Career/Money/Life category card to display a briefcase emoji (💼) icon and list three services: 'Career Guidance Reading – ₹399', 'Money & Abundance Reading – ₹499', and 'Life Purpose / Direction Reading – ₹699'

Update the Deep & Detailed Readings category card to display a crescent moon emoji (🌙) icon and list three services: 'Full Tarot Spread (6-8 cards) – ₹999', '1 Month Forecast – ₹899', and '3 Month Forecast – ₹1,499'

Update the Premium/Exclusive category card to display a fire emoji (🔥) icon and list three services: 'Soulmate / Twin Flame Reading – ₹1,499', 'Personalized Voice Note Reading – ₹1,999', and 'Emergency Same-Day Reading – + ₹300 extra'

Update the Important Notes section to display a pushpin emoji (📌) icon as the section header and list four policies with their respective emojis: '⏳ Delivery within 24-48 hours', '🎧 Voice / 📄 Written (as per package)', '❌ No health, legal, pregnancy predictions', and '🔒 100% confidential & intuitive reading'
Create a new dedicated Services Gallery section on the website that displays all tarot reading service category images in a visually organized layout
Display service category images with proper visual hierarchy showing category icons, titles, service descriptions, and pricing in Indian Rupees matching the format from the uploaded screenshots
Add the 'Schedule Your Reading' call-to-action button at the bottom of the Services Gallery section matching the purple button style shown in the uploaded images
Render all 28 uploaded tarot service category screenshots as static assets in the frontend/public/assets/generated directory
Update the serviceGalleryImages data array in frontend/src/data/serviceGalleryImages.ts to reference the 8 new uploaded screenshot filenames instead of the current service category image paths
